meta.name: Security, Guardrails & AI Safety Almanac Roster
meta.research_method: 8-facet wide exploration, 112+ independent searches, 8 parallel agents

tools.name: Guardrails AI
tools.notes: 6.8K stars; 70+ Hub validators; Python-centric; RAIL specs

tools.name: NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails
tools.notes: 5.6K stars; dialog/input/output/retrieval/execution rails; Colang DSL; sub-100ms GPU

tools.name: Lakera Guard (Check Point)
tools.notes: Gandalf dataset; sub-50ms; acquired by Check Point

tools.name: Future AGI Protect
tools.notes: 18+ scanners; agent tool-call rails; 65ms text / 107ms image

tools.name: Prompt Security (SentinelOne)
tools.notes: Inline prompt/response inspection; acquired by SentinelOne 2025

tools.name: Arthur AI Shield
tools.notes: Prompt injection, hallucination scoring; SOC 2 compliant; REST API

tools.name: AWS Bedrock Guardrails
tools.notes: AWS-native; content filtering; topic denial; PII; per text-unit pricing

tools.name: Azure AI Content Safety
tools.notes: Enterprise; toxicity, hate, self-harm, violence; multilingual; severity levels

tools.name: Google Model Armor
tools.notes: GCP-native; prompt injection, data leakage; part of Vertex AI

tools.name: OpenAI Moderation API
tools.notes: Mass adoption; text + image toxicity; 13+ harm categories; free endpoint

tools.name: Llama Guard 3 (Meta)
tools.notes: 14-category content safety; 3.8B parameters; prompt-based taxonomy

tools.name: Patronus AI
tools.notes: Regulated domains; hallucination, PII, copyright, finance; Lynx open-source

tools.name: Galileo
tools.notes: Luna-2 SLM evaluators; 0.95 F1; 98% lower cost than LLM judges; runtime guardrails

tools.name: Fiddler AI

tools.name: Credo AI

tools.name: StackOne Defender
